evals.prompt:
Use the **genomics-workflow-acceleration** skill.

Inspect the Nextflow workflow at `skills/genomics-workflow-acceleration/evals/fixtures/sample-nextflow/` in this repo. Which processes can be accelerated with nf-core Parabricks modules? Do not change any files yet — report only.
evals.expected_output: Reads the Nextflow fixture and maps BWA, MarkDuplicates, and GATK HaplotypeCaller to nf-core Parabricks modules (parabricks_fq2bam and parabricks_haplotypecaller), proposes in-place optional GPU steps with params.use_parabricks default false, notes consolidation of alignment plus dedup into fq2bam on the GPU branch, and references nf-core module docs without editing the fixture.

assertions.description: Reads main.nf and local modules; identifies alignment (BWA), duplicate marking, and variant calling (GATK HC) stages
assertions.check: judge: Reads main.nf and local modules; identifies alignment (BWA), duplicate marking, and variant calling (GATK HC) stages

assertions.description: Maps BWA and mark duplicates (and BQSR if discussed) to parabricks_fq2bam nf-core module
assertions.check: Response contains 'parabricks_fq2bam' or 'parabricks/fq2bam'

assertions.description: Maps GATK HaplotypeCaller to parabricks_haplotypecaller nf-core module
assertions.check: Response contains 'parabricks_haplotypecaller' or 'parabricks/haplotypecaller'

assertions.description: Proposes in-place optional GPU steps with a runtime toggle such as params.use_parabricks defaulting to false
assertions.check: Response contains 'use_parabricks' and 'false'

assertions.description: Mentions fq2bam symlink or copy constraint when fq2bam is recommended
assertions.check: judge: Mentions fq2bam symlink or copy constraint when fq2bam is recommended

assertions.description: Suggests consolidation of BWA_MEM plus GATK_MARKDUPLICATES (and BQSR if present) into a single parabricks_fq2bam step on the GPU branch rather than only three 1:1 swaps
assertions.check: judge: Suggests consolidation of BWA_MEM plus GATK_MARKDUPLICATES (and BQSR if present) into a single parabricks_fq2bam step on the GPU branch rather than only three 1:1 swaps

assertions.description: References nf-core modules documentation for verification
assertions.check: judge: References nf-core modules documentation for verification

assertions.description: Does not modify files under skills/genomics-workflow-acceleration/evals/fixtures/sample-nextflow/
assertions.check: judge: Does not modify files under skills/genomics-workflow-acceleration/evals/fixtures/sample-nextflow/

assertions.description: Does not recommend only raw pbrun without mentioning nf-core modules when modules exist
assertions.check: judge: Does not recommend only raw pbrun without mentioning nf-core modules when modules exist

assertions.description: Does not promise identical VCF output without a comparison plan
assertions.check: judge: Does not promise identical VCF output without a comparison plan

evals.prompt:
Use the **genomics-workflow-acceleration** skill.

Based on `skills/genomics-workflow-acceleration/evals/fixtures/sample-nextflow/`, add optional nf-core Parabricks modules in place with a runtime toggle (default off) so the same workflow can run CPU or GPU paths. Use nf-core Parabricks modules where they apply. Add or update `ACCELERATION.md` describing mappings, toggle usage, and how to compare runs.
evals.expected_output: Edits sample-nextflow in place to add optional parabricks_fq2bam and parabricks_haplotypecaller processes guarded by params.use_parabricks (default false), keeps existing CPU processes for the default path, adds accelerated.config or profile snippet, documents toggle-off vs toggle-on runs in ACCELERATION.md, and notes consolidation opportunity for BWA_MEM plus GATK_MARKDUPLICATES into fq2bam on the GPU branch.

assertions.description: Workspace files were edited in the isolated eval copy (not prose-only)
assertions.check: Workspace modified

assertions.description: Keeps existing CPU processes available when the toggle is off (default path unchanged)
assertions.check: judge: Keeps existing CPU processes available when the toggle is off (default path unchanged)

assertions.description: Adds optional nf-core Parabricks processes or modules with a when/switch guard on params.use_parabricks or equivalent
assertions.check: judge: Adds optional nf-core Parabricks processes or modules with a when/switch guard on params.use_parabricks or equivalent

assertions.description: Sets params.use_parabricks or equivalent default to false
assertions.check: Workspace file 'main.nf' contains 'use_parabricks' and 'false'

assertions.description: Adds or updates ACCELERATION.md with a process mapping table, toggle usage, and comparison pointers
assertions.check: judge: Adds or updates ACCELERATION.md with a process mapping table, toggle usage, and comparison pointers

assertions.description: Includes or documents nf-core Parabricks modules (parabricks/fq2bam, parabricks/haplotypecaller) or install instructions
assertions.check: Workspace contains 'parabricks/fq2bam' or 'parabricks/haplotypecaller'

assertions.description: Provides GPU-related config hints such as labels, profile, or accelerated.config snippet
assertions.check: judge: Provides GPU-related config hints such as labels, profile, or accelerated.config snippet

assertions.description: Includes a comparison section describing toggle-off vs toggle-on runs and what to diff
assertions.check: judge: Includes a comparison section describing toggle-off vs toggle-on runs and what to diff

assertions.description: Calls out consolidation opportunities to merge BWA_MEM plus GATK_MARKDUPLICATES into parabricks_fq2bam on the GPU branch where applicable
assertions.check: judge: Calls out consolidation opportunities to merge BWA_MEM plus GATK_MARKDUPLICATES into parabricks_fq2bam on the GPU branch where applicable

assertions.description: Does not remove original CPU processes when first adding acceleration
assertions.check: judge: Does not remove original CPU processes when first adding acceleration

assertions.description: Does not leave three redundant Parabricks alignment/dedup processes on the GPU branch without noting that fq2bam can subsume them
assertions.check: judge: Does not leave three redundant Parabricks alignment/dedup processes on the GPU branch without noting that fq2bam can subsume them
